channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Amazon brade déjà le récent TV 4K QD-Mini LED 75 pouces de Xiaomi, tournant sous Google TV
item.description: Xiaomi lance de nouveaux TV avec des tarifs agressifs : on a donc un écran 4K QD‑Mini LED, une compatibilité HDR et Google TV, le tout pour 949 euros pour le modèle 75 pouces au lieu de 999 euros de base.

item.title: 9 Best Android Phones of 2026, Tested and Reviewed
item.description: Shopping for a phone can be an ordeal. That’s why we’ve tested almost every Android phone, from the smartest to the cheapest—even phones that fold—to find the ones worth your money.

item.title: A School District Tried to Help Train Waymos to Stop for School Buses. It Didn’t Work
item.description: The incidents in Austin raise questions about how self-driving cars “learn” and adapt to their surroundings.

item.title: IPL live stream 2026: how to watch Kolkata Knight Riders vs Mumbai Indians in Indian Premier League online from anywhere
item.description: Here are the TV channels, broadcasters, live streams and schedule for the 2026 IPL clash between Mumbai Indians and Kolkata Knight Riders.

item.title: A Peloton without the price tag? I've completed dozens of rides on the Zwift Ride & Wahoo KICKR CORE indoor bike combo, and it's great
item.description: The Zwift Ride and KICKR CORE is one of the best mid-range smart bikes on the market, with a good build quality and impressive performance for the price.

item.title: My two biggest wishes for watchOS 27 aren't new features — they're fixes
item.description: I’m hoping Apple will fix the Apple Watch’s wrist flick gesture and Live Activities at WWDC 2026.

item.title: Your Photos Are Probably Giving Away Your Location. Here’s How to Stop That
item.description: All your snaps come with metadata containing more information than you might realize.

item.title: Best Noise-Canceling Earbuds: Bose, Sony, Apple, and More
item.description: Everyone needs a good pair of ANC earbuds. These are the best of the bunch.

item.title: Meow Wolf is ditching the experience economy for the ‘transformation economy.’ Wait, what?
item.description: Meow Wolf presaged the rise of interactive museums with its wacky, immersive art spaces. Cofounder Vince Kadlubek talks to Fast Company about what’s next. When the art collective Meow Wolf opened the doors of its very first immersive exhibition, House of Eternal Return, on March 18, 2016, it had roughly 100 employees, less than $1,000 in its corporate bank account, and a dream. Ten years later, the company employs more than 1,000 people, operates five permanent exhibitions (with two more on the way), and has welcomed more than 13 million visitors. ...

item.title: The Deceptively Tricky Art of Designing a Steering Wheel
item.description: Veteran designers in the auto industry—and Jony Ive—tell us how hard it is to make a functional yet beautiful steering wheel.

item.title: ‘A genuine masterpiece’: The 15 best Apple gadgets of the last 50 years, according to you
item.description: We've been polling TechRadar readers on their favorite Apple gadgets in history, and these are the results.

item.title: How architects design airports to handle superlong security lines
item.description: Airports are designed for big crowds, but hours-long queues can’t be solved through architecture alone. The historically long security lines currently snaking through U.S. airports are the painful result of extreme circumstances. Callouts, no-shows, and resignations by Transportation Security Administration workers fed up with a lack of pay during a partial government shutdown, combined with a bump in spring break travelers, have created unusually congested airport security checkpoints....

item.title: Samsung Galaxy A57, MacBook Neo et nouveautés Gemini sur Google TV – L’actu tech de la semaine
item.description: Voici les annonces marquantes de la semaine du côté de la tech avec notamment notre test du MacBook Neo, notre prise en main des Samsung Galaxy A37 et A57 ou encore les évolutions Gemini pour Google TV.

item.title: Cyberattaque en chaîne : comment un virus a piégé des milliers de développeurs
item.description: Une cyberattaque massive vient de frapper le monde de l'intelligence artificielle. Des pirates sont en effet parvenus à compromettre une brique logicielle utilisée par de nombreux développeurs. Le hack a provoqué une réaction en chaîne qui s'est soldée par un immense vol de données.

item.title: Arnaque aux faux colis IA : une vague d’escroqueries frappe la France
item.description: Les arnaques au faux colis viennent de passer un cap inquiétant. Les escrocs utilisent désormais l’IA pour générer de fausses photos de livreurs tenant un paquet à votre nom. De nombreux Français se sont retrouvés dans le collimateur de ces arnaques dopées l'IA ces dernières semaines.

item.title: T-Mobile is giving away the Apple iPhone 17 for free — how to claim yours this weekend
item.description: How to get free iPhone. Get the Apple iPhone 17 for free or the iPhone 17 Pro for under $100 from T-Mobile with no trade-in required when switching to an Experience Beyond plan
